headline: Walmart CEO Shift Puts Valuation And Growth Priorities In Focus
summary: Walmart has appointed John Furner as its new CEO, succeeding Doug McMillon. The leadership change comes as large U.S. companies overhaul executive teams in response to rapid industry shifts. Investors are watching for how the new CEO will approach private-label products, omnichannel growth, and technology use. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WMT, this leadership transition arrives after a strong multi year share performance, with the stock up 37.8% over the past year and 200.1% over five...

content.title: Walmart CEO Shift Puts Valuation And Growth Priorities In Focus
content.summary: Walmart has appointed John Furner as its new CEO, succeeding Doug McMillon. The leadership change comes as large U.S. companies overhaul executive teams in response to rapid industry shifts. Investors are watching for how the new CEO will approach private-label products, omnichannel growth, and technology use. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WMT, this leadership transition arrives after a strong multi year share performance, with the stock up 37.8% over the past year and 200.1% over five...

headline: Sam’s Club Launches Enhanced Express Delivery, Fueling Continued eCommerce Growth with Checkout to Doorstep Delivery in as Soon as an Hour – Often Less
summary: BENTONVILLE, Ark., April 22, 2026--Sam’s Club, a leading membership retail club, has launched an enhanced tier to its popular Express delivery, enabling members to go from checkout to doorstep delivery on thousands of in-club items in as little as an hour—often faster—with no minimum purchase and at the same price as in the club.

content.title: Sam’s Club Launches Enhanced Express Delivery, Fueling Continued eCommerce Growth with Checkout to Doorstep Delivery in as Soon as an Hour – Often Less

headline: Brightstar Capital Partners Invests in Bendon, a Provider of Screen-Free Children’s Activity Products
summary: NEW YORK & WEST PALM BEACH, Fla., April 22, 2026--Brightstar Capital Partners ("Brightstar"), a private equity firm focused on partnering with entrepreneurs and management teams, today announced its acquisition of Bendon Publishing International, Inc. ("Bendon" or "the Company"), a designer and distributor of licensed children’s coloring, activity, and educational products. headline: SpaceX IPO: could Musk pick Texas over Nasdaq?
summary: Exchanges are clamoring over SpaceX's highly anticipated IPO, but could Elon Musk and Company defy norms and list on the Texas Stock Exchange rather than the Nasdaq or NYSE? Trader Talk host Kenny Polcari is joined by Amy Wu Silverman, RBC Capital Markets Head of Derivatives Strategy, Kevin Kelly, Kelly Intelligence Founder, CEO and CCO, and former Ellevest Head of People Ops Amanda Polcari to discuss.

headline: Gnosis Freight adds Walmart veteran Gary Adams to its board

headline: Gnosis Freight Appoints Former Walmart Supply Chain Officer, Gary M. Adams, to Board of Directors
summary: Gnosis Freight ("Gnosis"), a leading AI Global Freight Operating System and execution infrastructure layer for global trade, today announced the appointment of Gary M. Adams to its Board of Directors. Adams most recently served as Head of Global Logistics at Walmart.

headline: Zilliz is recognized as a 'Stars Company' in MarketsandMarkets' latest 360Quadrant for the Vector Database Market
summary: Zilliz, the creator of Milvus — the world's most widely adopted open-source vector database with over 43,000 GitHub stars and more than 10,000 enterprise deployments — has been recognized as a 'Stars Company' in the Vector Database market on MarketsandMarkets' 360Quadrants platform.

headline: California attorney general says Amazon used ‘intimidation’ to get competitors like Walmart and Target to fix prices
summary: Emails suggest the retail giant pushed companies to ‘fix’ or ‘correct’ prices so they don’t undercut Amazon on eye drops, khakis, pet treats and more.

content.title: California attorney general says Amazon used ‘intimidation’ to get competitors like Walmart and Target to fix prices
content.summary: Emails suggest the retail giant pushed companies to ‘fix’ or ‘correct’ prices so they don’t undercut Amazon on eye drops, khakis, pet treats and more.

headline: Is It Worth Investing in Walmart (WMT) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Walmart (WMT) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

content.title: Is It Worth Investing in Walmart (WMT) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?

headline: California Says Amazon Engaged In Illegal Price-Fixing Scheme—Attorney General Says 'Evidence We've Uncovered Is Clear As Day'
summary: California officials on Monday said newly unsealed court filings show Amazon.com Inc. engaged in an illegal price-fixing scheme that allegedly pushed up prices across major retailers. Amazon Price Fixing Allegations Involving Major Retailers In a press release, California Attorney General Rob Bonta said the state has obtained unredacted court filings that allegedly show Amazon pressuring vendors and retailers to raise prices across competing platforms, including Walmart and Target. "The evidence
